subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared and revealed that which He willed, when humanity was immersed in manifest delusion. Through His power hath He rolled up the carpet of vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر و اظهر ما اراد اذ کان الناس فی وهم مبین قد طوی بقدرته بساط الظنون
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the concourse on high, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
